creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

> In this case, when using the "Reply" link on a comment, which quotes the comment,

No, it does not quote the comment. Only the comment number is referenced, and I am not permitted to change it in the Preferences. So I do all quoting manually.

> the function in question is also a User Preference:
> "Position of the Additional Comments box"

Ah, thanks for that. I must have overlooked it.
